overall.description: Cinematic drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a dark futuristic corporate atrium with neon cyan lighting and parked hover vehicles. The camera smoothly orbits the plaza revealing an Arasaka digital billboard displaying '2076' and sleek modern architecture with glowing floor accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate atrium with vehicle display

agents.ego_description: smoothly drifting through the plaza observing the parked hover cars and digital signage

entered.detail: large curved screen displaying Arasaka advertisement with red logo and year 2076
rectangular planter containing palm tree with surrounding benches
sleek red sports car with glowing red undercarriage lights
dark colored luxury vehicle parked near the back wall
glowing cyan lines embedded in the dark floor marking pathways

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark futuristic corporate atrium illuminated by cyan neon floor strips. An Arasaka digital billboard dominates the right side of the frame while two hover cars sit parked in the center. The camera drifts smoothly leftward, maintaining focus on the central plaza area with its distinctive planter and vehicle display.

events.description: moving into the darker rear section of the atrium away from the main entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing to drift toward the back wall featuring the illuminated staircase

entered.detail: wide staircase with glowing cyan trim along the steps leading to upper level
glass railing walkway on the second floor overlooking the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the rear section of the atrium where the Arasaka billboard is no longer visible. The focus shifts to a wide staircase with neon cyan trim on the left and the parked vehicles now positioned toward the right of the frame. The space feels more enclosed as the camera approaches the back wall structure.

events.description: rounding the corner back toward the entrance with the digital billboard reappearing

agents.ego_description: completing the circuit of the plaza and approaching the entrance area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking across the plaza floor toward the entrance

entered.detail: large curved screen displaying Arasaka advertisement with red logo and year 2076

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its orbit and returns to the entrance area, bringing the Arasaka digital billboard back into view on the right. A pedestrian walks across the plaza floor as the parked vehicles shift back to their original relative positions. The scene ends with a clear view of the entrance columns and the glowing billboard above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement through a dark futuristic corporate atrium that circles from a wide plaza into an enclosed rear section before returning to the main entrance. It begins by drifting leftward across the central plaza, where cyan neon floor strips illuminate parked hover cars and a dominant Arasaka digital billboard. As the camera moves deeper into the rear of the atrium, the billboard disappears from view and the perspective shifts toward a wide staircase with neon trim and a looming back wall. The scene then completes its orbit, swinging back toward the entrance area as a pedestrian crosses the floor and the parked vehicles slide back into their original positions. Finally, the camera settles on a clear view of the entrance columns and the glowing Arasaka billboard returning to the right side of the frame.
